name: A
description: Make a fist with your thumb resting along the side, against the index finger.
tip: Think of an 'A' as a closed hand—like holding an apple in your fist.

name: B
description: Hold your hand up flat with fingers together and the thumb folded across the palm.
tip: A flat 'Board' for the letter B.

name: C
description: Curve your hand into the shape of the letter C.
tip: Your hand literally forms a 'C' shape.

name: D
description: Point your index finger up; touch the thumb to the middle finger to form a circle.
tip: One finger up like the stem of a lowercase 'd'.

name: E
description: Curl your fingers down so the fingertips touch the thumb, forming a claw-like shape.
tip: Fingers 'Eat' into the palm for E.

name: F
description: Touch your index finger to your thumb forming a circle; keep the other three fingers up.
tip: 'OK' but for F—three fingers up.

name: G
description: Point your index finger and thumb sideways, parallel to each other.
tip: A sideways 'Gun' shape pointing forward.

name: H
description: Extend your index and middle fingers together sideways, thumb tucked.
tip: Two fingers side by side, 'Horizontal' for H.

name: I
description: Make a fist and raise only your pinky finger.
tip: The smallest finger for the slim letter 'I'.

name: J
description: Raise your pinky like 'I', then trace the shape of a J in the air.
tip: Draw the hook of a 'J' with your pinky.

name: K
description: Index and middle fingers up in a V, thumb tucked between them.
tip: Thumb 'Kisses' the middle finger for K.

name: L
description: Extend your thumb and index finger to form an L shape.
tip: It literally looks like the letter 'L'.

name: M
description: Tuck your thumb under your first three fingers folded over it.
tip: Three fingers over the thumb—three humps like 'M'.

name: N
description: Tuck your thumb under your first two fingers folded over it.
tip: Two fingers over the thumb—two humps like 'N'.

name: O
description: Curve all fingers and thumb together to form a round O shape.
tip: Your hand makes a clear 'O' circle.

name: P
description: Like K but pointed downward—index and middle fingers down, thumb between.
tip: A 'K' turned upside down points to P.

name: Q
description: Like G but pointed downward—index finger and thumb point down.
tip: A 'G' aimed at the ground becomes Q.

name: R
description: Cross your index and middle fingers, pointing upward.
tip: Crossed fingers 'Wrapped' together for R.

name: S
description: Make a fist with your thumb crossing over the front of your fingers.
tip: Thumb in front—a 'Strong' fist for S.

name: T
description: Make a fist with your thumb tucked between the index and middle fingers.
tip: Thumb peeks out 'Through' the fingers for T.

name: U
description: Hold your index and middle fingers up together, thumb tucked.
tip: Two fingers 'United' side by side for U.

name: V
description: Hold your index and middle fingers up in a V (peace sign), thumb tucked.
tip: The classic 'Victory' V shape.

name: W
description: Hold up your index, middle, and ring fingers, thumb holding the pinky.
tip: Three fingers up—'W' has three points.

name: X
description: Make a fist and bend your index finger into a hook.
tip: A hooked finger like the bend in an 'X'.

name: Y
description: Extend your thumb and pinky, keeping the middle fingers folded.
tip: The 'hang loose' / shaka sign for Y.

name: Z
description: Point your index finger and draw a Z shape in the air.
tip: Trace the letter 'Z' with your fingertip.

description: Hold up your index finger, palm facing out.
tip: One finger for number one.

description: Hold up your index and middle fingers in a V.
tip: Two fingers—just like a peace sign.

description: Hold up your thumb, index, and middle fingers.
tip: Thumb counts too—three fingers including the thumb.

description: Hold up four fingers with the thumb tucked in.
tip: Four fingers up, thumb hidden.

description: Spread all five fingers open, palm facing out.
tip: An open hand—all five fingers.

name: Hello
description: Place an open hand near your forehead and move it outward in a small salute.
tip: Like a friendly salute waving outward.

name: Thank You
description: Touch your fingertips to your chin and move your hand forward and down.
tip: Blow a kiss of gratitude from your chin outward.

name: Please
description: Rub your flat open hand in a circular motion over your chest.
tip: A circular rub over the heart means 'please'.

name: Yes
description: Make a fist and nod it up and down like a head nodding.
tip: Your fist nods 'yes' just like your head.

name: No
description: Tap your index and middle fingers against your thumb, like a mouth saying no.
tip: Snap two fingers to the thumb—a tiny mouth saying 'no'.

name: I Love You
description: Extend your thumb, index finger, and pinky simultaneously.
tip: Combines the letters I, L, and Y into one handshape.
